name: calculate-wb
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.stations.every(s => Number.isFinite(s.weight) && Number.isFinite(s.arm) && Number.isFinite(s.moment))
_note: W&B (Weight & Balance). The W&B editor (app/lenses/aviation/page.tsx#renderWBEditor) persists a FLAT artifact.data shape — emptyWeight/emptyArm + per-station <name>Weight/<name>Arm pairs (fuel/pilot/copilot/paxRow1/paxRow2/cargo/baggage) + maxGross/fwdCGLimit/aftCGLimit. The handler was written for the STRUCTURED { aircraft:{emptyWeight,emptyArm,maxGrossWeight,cgEnvelope:{fwd,aft}}, loading:[{station,weight,arm}] } shape, so the W&B Calculate button returned gross 0 / cg 0 for EVERY input (a dead safety-critical calculator). normalizeWBInput now folds BOTH shapes onto the same math; non-finite numerics drop to 0 so a poisoned field never NaN/Infinity-s gross weight or CG. The Action Result panel renders grossWeight/cg/totalMoment/stations[]/maxGrossWeight/summary EXACTLY (a render block for these was added — they were never displayed before). Fixed 2026-06-28.
